name: Bryan Maxwell
bio: Bryan Maxwell is listed among candidates in the Democratic primary for Illinois' open U.S. Senate seat in 2026. Public ballot reporting includes him in the March 17 primary field. (Source: Shaw Local primary ballot guide, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: FEC totals pending direct ETL import.
